prompt: Use wider brush strokes to create a more dynamic and expressive painting style.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Reinterpret the painting in image 1 by applying a style with noticeably wider, more prominent brush strokes throughout the entire artwork. This modification should transform the portrait into a more dynamic and expressive representation, emphasizing the texture and visible application of paint to create a bolder, more energetic artistic impression rather than a smoothly blended finish.
